actions.detail: Validated wp-20260303-lcs-cid-sid-mid-pipeline. Found 2 blockers: repo not in registry, DB_CHANGESET missing.
Added company-lifecycle-cl to IMO-Creator repo_registry.json (human-authorized).

Created DB Agent WORK_PACKET at work_packets/inbox/wp-20260303-lcs-cid-sid-mid-db-changeset.json. DB Agent executed and produced: db_changeset.json, schema_diff.md, 005_lcs_cid_sid_mid.sql, 005_lcs_cid_sid_mid_rollback.sql, column_registry_patch.yml, worker_briefing.md.
Created src/data/lcs/types/cid.ts, sid-output.ts, mid-sequence-state.ts. Updated enums.ts (+8 types), frame-registry.ts (+5 columns), index.ts (+3 exports).
Created src/app/lcs/pipeline/cid-compiler.ts. Reads signal_queue, collects intelligence, matches frame, runs capacity+freshness gates, mints communication_id, writes to lcs.cid.

Created src/app/lcs/pipeline/sid-worker.ts. Reads COMPILED CIDs, resolves audience (CEO→CFO→HR priority), constructs message content, writes to lcs.sid_output. DEVIATION: cron-polled batch instead of DB trigger.

Created src/app/lcs/pipeline/mid-engine.ts. Reads CONSTRUCTED SIDs, fetches CID context, checks frame sequence type, runs capacity+suppression gates, mints message_run_id, calls adapter, writes to lcs.mid_sequence_state, logs to CET, handles ORBT errors.
Created src/runtime/lcs/cid-sid-mid-cron.ts. Orchestrates three-phase pipeline in sequence with timing and aggregated stats.
Added @deprecated JSDoc to src/app/lcs/pipeline/orchestrator.ts and src/runtime/lcs/cron-runner.ts pointing to new CID→SID→MID pipeline.
Created src/sys/lcs/contracts/lcs_cid.schema.sql, lcs_sid_output.schema.sql, lcs_mid_sequence_state.schema.sql. Updated lcs_frame_registry.schema.sql (v2.2.0→v2.3.0).
Applied column_registry_patch.yml to column_registry.yml: Section A (SH-LCS-PIPELINE sub-hub, 3 tables) + Section B (5 frame_registry columns).
Migration 005 already applied to Neon. Verified: lcs.cid (1 row), lcs.sid_output (0 rows), lcs.mid_sequence_state (0 rows), frame_registry has all 5 new columns.
Produced changesets/outbox/wp-20260303-lcs-cid-sid-mid-pipeline/changeset.json with 10 created + 7 modified files.
Produced audit/ARCH_PRESSURE_REPORT.json. 5/5 invariants PASS: cantonal_cardinality, registry_first, id_authority, no_sideways_calls, contracts_declared.
Produced audit/FLOW_PRESSURE_REPORT.json. 5/5 invariants PASS: ingress_contract_exists, egress_contract_exists, no_orphan_tables, no_unconsumed_events, id_propagation_intact.
Created migrations/lcs/005a_lcs_cid_notify_sid_worker.sql. Applied to Neon. Trigger trg_lcs_cid_notify_sid_worker fires pg_notify('lcs_sid_worker') on COMPILED CID inserts.

actions.action: Phase 3 DB trigger — SID worker LISTEN mode
actions.detail: Updated sid-worker.ts: added startSidWorkerListener() using raw pg LISTEN on lcs_sid_worker channel. Dual mode: real-time LISTEN + cron batch fallback. Phase 3 deviation resolved.
This file.

actions.action: DB Agent — Research database migration (ctb + doctrine schemas)
actions.detail: Migrated 4 tables from research DB (ep-young-block-aii5nj6b) to CL Neon: ctb.table_registry (3→20 rows), doctrine.doctrine_library (668 rows, 1536-dim pgvector embeddings), doctrine.doctrine_key (335 rows), doctrine.doctrine_library_error (0 rows). Enabled pgvector extension. Created IVFFlat index on embeddings.
Registered all 20 tables across cl, lcs, doctrine, ctb schemas in ctb.table_registry. Verified doctrine library queryable via semantic search.

actions.action: DB Agent — Type B documentation (DOCUMENTATION_ERD_DOCTRINE v1.0.0)
actions.detail: Produced 3 new docs: LCS_CID_SID_MID.md (pipeline column dictionaries), LCS_PIPELINE_ERD.md (Mermaid ERD, 8 entities), CTB_DOCTRINE_TABLES.md (ctb + doctrine tables). Updated LCS_DATA_MODEL.md (v2.2.0→v2.3.0) and CL_SCHEMA_INDEX.md.
